LanguageData.TweakSubSection_NoFriendShapedManhunters: Sets parameters which decide if an animal can arrive as manhunter or not. This does not prevent it happening if they take damage. This can result in the initial Royalty quest not firing as it requires manhunting animal that specifically fits the parameters this tweak is designed to prevent, I'd recommend enabling this AFTER that quest.
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_TaintedApparel.label: Tainted Apparel
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_PrisonersDontHaveKeys.de: Selectively controls whether prisoners and slaves can open doors during breakout and rebellion.
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_SlimRim.label: Slim Rim
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_SlimRim.description: Allows the limiting of pawn body tpes on generation, the replacement will be either Male or Female depending on the pawns current gender.
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_TraitCountAdjustment.des: As of 1.4 this isn't fully functional, changes to the way traits generate made it so the first 1-3 can always generate like normal, regardless of what I do. So this is only usefuly currently for those who want to guarantee more than 1 or have more in general. Won't affect newborns/children as they have a complicated system for their growth.
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_AncientDeconstruction.de: Makes the Ancient Ruins added by Ideology and/or Biotech deconstructable instead of having to destroy them.
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_DynamicPopulation.label: Dynamic Population
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_DynamicPopulation.descri: Provides control over the population thresholds universally, overriding storyteller limitations.
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_RaidStrategies.label: Raid Strategies
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_RaidStrategies.descripti: Provides control over the raid strategies which can be used by factions. Keep in mind that if a faction only uses strategies you have disabled, they will never be seen, it hasn't come up yet though.
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_FasterSmoothing.label: Faster Smoothing
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_FasterSmoothing.descript: Changes the speed at which stone smoothing is done to a custom value.
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_Skills.label: Skills
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_HuntersCanMelee.label: Hunters Can Use Melee
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_HuntersCanMelee.descript: Allows hunters to use melee, regardless of how well they can do so.
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_PowerAdjusting.label: Power Adjusting
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_PowerAdjusting.descripti: If enabled, allows the below power changes to take effect. If they usually produce then it configures how much they output instead, which will instead show as a negative value slider.
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_TechTraversal.label: Tech Traversal
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_TechTraversal.descriptio: Tweaks specific the players tech level changing as they progress.
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_StackableChunks.label: Stackable Chunks
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_StackableChunks.descript: Allows stone chunks and slag to be stackable. Changing this mid-save WILL cause issues.
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_AnimaScream.label: Anima Scream
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_AnimaScream.description: Tweaks specific to the anima scream from when you cut down the anima tree.
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_AnimaTree.label: Anima Tree
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_AnimaTree.description: Tweaks specific to the anima tree itself.
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_AnimaShrines.label: Anima Shrines
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_AnimaShrines.description: These are specific to the nature shrines that can be built to enhance the Anima tree.
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_HarbingerTree.label: Habringer Tree
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_HarbingerTree.descriptio: Tweaks specific to the Harbinger tree.
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_GauranlenTree.label: Gauranlen Tree
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_GauranlenTree.descriptio: Tweaks specific to the Gauranlen tree itself.
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_Dryads.label: Dryads
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_Dryads.description: Tweaks specific to the dryads that come from the Gauranlen Tree.
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_BetterGloomlight.label: Better Gloomlight
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_BetterGloomlight.descrip: Changes the gloomlight often found in mech clusters to produce more light so it's actually useful.
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_Biotech_GeneStats.label: Gene Stats
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_PlayerMechs.label: Player Mechanoid Stats
LanguageData.TweakSubSection_PlayerMechs.description: Allows the changing of work stats for player mechanoids so they don't suck nearly as much.
